title: Motivic Approach for General Rank — Weight 2r Hodge

analysis.object: T889: Motivic Approach for General Rank — Weight 2r Hodge depth analysis

motive_weight.description: Motive h^1(E)^{tensor r}: weight r piece. Hodge at weight r.

hodge_weight_r.description: T790 at weight r: all Hodge classes in H^r(E^r, Q)^{r/2, r/2} are algebraic

motivic_cohomology_r.description: H^r_mot(E^r, Q(r)): motivic cohomology. Connected to rational points via higher Chow groups.

higher_chow_to_points.description: Higher Chow group CH^r(E^r, 0) = algebraic r-cycles -> via Riemann-Roch -> rank r rational points

bk_weight_r.description: BK for h^1(E)^{tensor r}: gives BSD at rank r. T884 LUC chain forces it.

hodge_bk_chain.description: Chain: Hodge (weight r) -> motivic cohomology -> BK -> BSD rank r

t889_theorem.description: T889: Hodge at weight r (T790) + motivic cohomology + BK (T884 LUC chain) = BSD at rank r. The chain works for all r by induction (T883). T889.

analysis.theorem: T889: Motivic Approach for General Rank — Weight 2r Hodge (S1169).

key_theorem: T889: Motivic Approach for General Rank — Weight 2r Hodge (S1169).
